---
title: "Change Log"
execute:
  eval: false
  echo: true
  warning: false
---

## Change Log

### Contents

- [Changes on 23.07.2026](#changes-on-24.07.2026)
- [Changes on 23.07.2026](#changes-on-23.07.2026)
- [Changes on 22.07.2026](#changes-on-22.07.2026)
- [Changes on 23.06.2026](#changes-on-23.06.2026)
- [Changes on 22.06.2026](#changes-on-22.06.2026)
- [Changes on 19.06.2026](#changes-on-19.06.2026)
- [Changes on 18.06.2026](#changes-on-18.06.2026)
- [Changes on 17.06.2026](#changes-on-17.06.2026)
- [Changes on 16.06.2026](#changes-on-16.06.2026)


# changes-on-23.07.2026

1. Create similar structure for all three types, move project type and sample type into section 5
2. Create a combined columns in the project table.
3. “Biological Samples” is now read-only and tkaes it value from the Excel sheet.
4. For Intact projects:
- Removed Biological Samples and Technical Replicates from the creation and edit forms.
- Sample overview upload is optional.
- modified intact template for upload
5. Updated all Project Type and Sample Type dropdowns with the new entries based on the new Excel sheet.

## Changes on 23.07.2026 

1. moved the "Sample Overview Table" in the New Project Creation Window to be directly after "Contact and Billing".
2. Change project ID to Pr_ for proteomics, Me_ for metabolomics and In_ for intact project types instead of Orbi for all three 
3. renamed "Number of Samples" to "Biological Samples", added another field with "Technical Replicates" next to it. 
4. Updated the project tables to include project name again and remove responsible user.
5. Columns Status and Last Update were combined into one
A atble of past status updates was added in the project edit page.
6. “What do you want to know?” and “Special requirements” now appear side by side with equal-height text areas.

## Changes on 22.07.2026

1. Corrected the OmicsDesk helpdesk address from `omics@bochem.mpg.de` to `omicsdesk@biochem.mpg.de` for upload-pool fallback notifications.
2. Updated the application fallback in `ms-app/db_schema.R` and the documented `MS_POOL_FALLBACK_EMAIL` VM configuration.
3. The address can be set explicitly in `/srv/shiny-server/ms-app/.Renviron`; restart `shiny-server` after changing it. No database recreation is required.
4. Changed all downloadable sample-overview templates from comma-separated `.csv` files to tab-delimited `.txt` files.
5. Sample-overview uploads accept `.txt`, `.csv`, and `.tsv` files and automatically detect tab, comma, or semicolon separators.
6. add help function via question marks on the GUI


## Changes on 23.06.2026

1. LDAP configuration was fixed. App on the VM now starts using LDAP. 
2. `deploy.sh` section was added to [Setup page](setup-infrastructure.qmd#deploy-(vm))
3. 

## Changes on 22.06.2026

1. App was set locally. database was modified to include the appropriate fields
2. changes were done to the documentation to make them cleaner and more ms-core facility related.
3. App now include landing pages as well.
4. multiple fields were changes and modified after discussion with MSCF-admins
5. mail communication needs to be adjusted.

## Changes on 19.06.2026

1. clean documents further. Remove all parts from the BCFNGS-VM or the perl branch of the VM.

## Changes on 18.06.2026

1. Cleaning the documentation further.
2. Install https certificate from HARICA and successfully test https connection
3. configure `.Renviron` and LDAP on the VM to work with the shiny server

## Changes on 17.06.2026

1. cleaning and shrinking documentation
2. finish installing all packages on the VM; upgrading R version to 4.6

## Changes on 16.06.2026

1. [github repository](https://github.com/yeroslaviz/BCFMS-project-management) was set up
2. mscf-vm was set-up for and a https certificate was applied for.
3. connect VM to github
4. run `bash scripts/check_requirements.sh` to install requirements, both R packages and ubuntu packages
5. modify script `deploy.sh` to fit the new VM specifications
6. setting up the shiny-server, connect to ldap server
